ModifyReservedInstances.reservedInstances: List of reserved instances to modify
ModifyReservedInstances.reservedInstances.reservedInstanceId: ID of the reserved instance to modify
ModifyReservedInstances.reservedInstances.zoneName: Target availability zone to modify, e.g. cn-bj-b. Cannot be modified together with reservedInstanceName
ModifyReservedInstances.reservedInstances.reservedInstanceName: Name of the reserved instance; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a Chinese character or letter; length 1-65, duplicates allowed; auto-named as reservedInstance-${random} if unset. Cannot be modified together with zoneName
ModifyReservedInstances.reservedInstances.ehcClusterId: Optional parameter when modifying ROCE reserved instances; uses default EHC cluster if empty
